chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1860 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing For hearing of main case. 20-05-2025 Mr. Ramiz Nasim, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General DSP Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, Foreign Registration Officers Special Branch, Karachi and SIP Jawaid Akhtar, FRO/SB, Karachi. Ms. Mashal Khan, Inspector FIA, I&AHS, JIAP, Karachi. Comments filed on behalf of respondents are taken on record. The comments state as follows:- It is therefore humbly requested that kindly be passed the orders in the larger interest of justice. 1. To allow to verify their travel documents through Ministry of foreigner affairs for confirmation of their genuineness. 2. To allow to verify their status, criminal record CRO / CRI accordingly because they are illegally staying in Pakistan since long. 3. To direct D.G NADRA Sindh to verify the petitioner through Bio- Matric for NADRA registration, if petitioners register in NADRA, their CNIC's may be canceled/Blocked and also provide clearance certificate to petitioners. 4. To allow, to deport to their native country, after completing legal and required formalities under the foreigner Act 1946. Sd/- Foreigner Registration Officer, Special Branch, Karachi. (On behalf of respondent No.02 & 04) Learned counsel for the petitioner states that it may be just and proper for this petition to be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
